name: @lo/cli
description: LO developer command-line interface for checking, building, serving, reporting and running safe tasks.

scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix ../lo-project-graph run build && npm --prefix ../lo-tasks run build && tsc --noEmit
scripts.build: npm --prefix ../lo-project-graph run build && npm --prefix ../lo-tasks run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
